Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO PROCUREMENT AND CONTRACTS

Title: Relates to the purchase of firearms, ammunition, and firearm accessories
Summary: Requires bidders on contracts to purchase firearms, ammunition, and firearm accessories to submit a statement that the bidder is licensed and in compliance with all applicable federal, state, and local laws, rules and regulations relating to the sale, transfer, storage and disposition of firearms, ammunition and firearm accessories.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the state finance law, in relation to the purchase of firearms, ammunition, and firearm accessories
